name: mcp-cbs-cijfers-open-data
description_en: Makes official Dutch statistics from CBS (StatLine) accessible for AI assistants.

name: nl-opendata-mcp
description_en: Search, query, download, and locally analyse CBS (OData) and data.overheid.nl datasets in CSV or Parquet.

name: open-utrecht-datasets
description_en: Search, explore, and download Municipality of Utrecht open datasets across six tools, with experimental Woo-relevance tagging (full Woo-document search is planned).

name: nl-gov-mcp
description_en: Reach 39 Dutch government data sources through one server — CBS, RDW, KNMI, PDOK, Rechtspraak, DUO, and more.

name: knmi-mcp
description_en: Pull KNMI real-time weather observations (10-minute measurements) for Dutch locations.

name: knmi-mcp (dstotijn)
description_en: Query KNMI weather observations and forecasts through KNMI's open data API.

name: OpenTK MCP
description_en: Query Tweede Kamer (Dutch parliament) debates, motions, and documents.

name: Rijksmuseum MCP
description_en: Search and browse the Rijksmuseum's art collection by artist, work, and theme.

name: oorlogsbronnen-mcp
description_en: Search Oorlogsbronnen's archive of 12 million Dutch WWII sources.

name: openarchieven-mcp
description_en: Search Open Archieven genealogy records through a no-auth hosted endpoint.

name: mcp-gemeente-amsterdam
description_en: Query Amsterdam's open APIs across buildings, WOZ, parking, waste, monuments, permits, soil, and more from one server.

name: baarn-raadsinformatie
description_en: Search Gemeente Baarn council meetings, agendas, and documents via the Notubiz API, with keyword and semantic search.
